---
name: Research Proposal
about: Propose a new architectural mechanism or experiment
title: "[RESEARCH] "
labels: research
assignees: ''
---

## Hypothesis

State the testable hypothesis clearly. What do you expect to improve, and why?

> Example: "Allocating more hidden dimensions to the bivector grade will improve
> relational reasoning (BoolQ, WinoGrande) because relations are encoded in
> grade-2 components."

## Mechanism

Describe the proposed architectural change. Be specific about what code changes.

## Baseline Comparison

Which existing model does this compare against?

- [ ] Model A (dense baseline)
- [ ] Model B (looped, flat)
- [ ] Model C (HDIM bolted-on)
- [ ] Model D (GDR)

## Ablation Design

What is the single variable under test? What is held constant?

## Success Criterion

What result would confirm the hypothesis?

## Failure Criterion

What result would falsify it? What is the pivot if it fails?

## Estimated Cost

- Compute: (GPU-hours)
- Implementation effort: (days)
- Risk level: (low / medium / high)

## References

Relevant papers or prior work.
